The '''Nintendo NX''' is the development code name for a new video game platform in development by [[Nintendo]], announced in March 2015.



==History==
{{quote box| align=right| width=50%|quote = As proof that Nintendo maintains strong enthusiasm for the dedicated game system business, let me confirm that Nintendo is currently developing a dedicated game platform with a brand-new concept under the development codename gNX.h It is too early to elaborate on the details of this project, but we hope to share more information with you next year.| source = Satoru Iwata, Press conference, 17 March 2015.{{sfn|Iwata|Moriyasu|2015|p=3}} }}

At a joint press conference with japanese mobile gaming provider [[DeNA]] on 17 March 2015 held to announce a business alliance between the two companies, Nintendo CEO [[Satoru Iwata]] also announced that the company was developing ''a dedicated game platform with a brand-new concept under the development codename "NX".''; the new system is expected to integrate with a membership service provided by Nintendo and DeNA, available across other gaming platforms, including [[3DS]], [[WiiU]], as well as [[smart device]]s, and [[PC]]s. The NX platform is expected to be a new video game system.<ref>{{citation| url = http://www.eurogamer.net/articles/2015-03-17-nintendo-nx-is-new-hardware-with-a-brand-new-concept| title =  Nintendo NX is "new hardware with a brand new concept" | first = Wesley| last = Yin-Poole| date = 17 Mar 2015| work = www.eurogamer.net }}</ref>
